# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'npm run build'
          - 'npm run build:prod'
          - 'yarn build'
          - 'mvn clean install'
          - 'gradle build'
          - 'make build'
          - 'python setup.py build'
          - 'go build'
          - 'cargo build --release'
          - 'dotnet build'
      test_command:
        description: 'Test command to execute'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - 'npm test'
          - 'npm run test:ci'
          - 'yarn test'
          - 'mvn test'
          - 'gradle test'
          - 'make test'
          - 'pytest'
          - 'go test ./...'
          - 'cargo test'
          - 'dotnet test'
        default: 'none'
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'development'
          - 'staging'
          - 'production'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '14'
          - '16'
          - '18'
          - '20'
        default: '18'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'
        default: '17'
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '3.8'
          - '3.9'
          - '3.10'
          - '3.11'
        default: '3.11'

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      is_valid: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.is_valid }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          ALLOWED_COMMANDS="npm run build|npm run build:prod|yarn build|mvn clean install|gradle build|make build|python setup.py build|go build|cargo build --release|dotnet build"
          ALLOWED_TESTS="none|npm test|npm run test:ci|yarn test|mvn test|gradle test|make test|pytest|go test ./...|cargo test|dotnet test"
          
          if echo "$ALLOWED_COMMANDS" | grep -qF "${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}"; then
            echo "Build command is valid"
          else
            echo "Invalid build command"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if echo "$ALLOWED_TESTS" | grep -qF "${{ github.event.inputs.test_command }}"; then
            echo "Test command is valid"
          else
            echo "Invalid test command"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "is_valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  setup-environment:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      setup_complete: ${{ steps.setup.outputs.complete }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'npm') || contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'yarn')
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.node_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'npm') && 'npm' || 'yarn' }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'mvn') || contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'gradle')
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.java_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'mvn') && 'maven' || 'gradle' }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'python') || contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'pytest')
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.python_version }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Setup Go
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'go')
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.21'
          cache: true

      - name: Setup Rust
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'cargo')
        uses: actions-rust-lang/setup-rust-toolchain@v1

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'dotnet')
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: '8.0.x'

      - name: Mark setup complete
        id: setup
        run: echo "complete=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  build:
    needs: setup-environment
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'npm') || contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'yarn')
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.node_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'npm') && 'npm' || 'yarn' }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'mvn') || contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'gradle')
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.java_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'mvn') && 'maven' || 'gradle' }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'python')
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.python_version }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Setup Go
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'go')
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.21'
          cache: true

      - name: Setup Rust
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'cargo')
        uses: actions-rust-lang/setup-rust-toolchain@v1

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'dotnet')
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: '8.0.x'

      - name: Install dependencies (npm)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'npm')
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install dependencies (yarn)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'yarn')
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install dependencies (pip)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.build_command, 'python')
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Execute build command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          CI: true

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            target/
            out/
            bin/
          retention-days: 7

  test:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event.inputs.test_command != 'none'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'npm') || contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'yarn')
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.node_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'npm') && 'npm' || 'yarn' }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'mvn') || contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'gradle')
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.java_version }}
          cache: ${{ contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'mvn') && 'maven' || 'gradle' }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'pytest')
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.python_version }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Setup Go
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'go')
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.21'
          cache: true

      - name: Setup Rust
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'cargo')
        uses: actions-rust-lang/setup-rust-toolchain@v1

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'dotnet')
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: '8.0.x'

      - name: Install dependencies (npm)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'npm')
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install dependencies (yarn)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'yarn')
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install dependencies (pip)
        if: contains(github.event.inputs.test_command, 'pytest')
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi

      - name: Execute test command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.test_command }}
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results-${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          path: |
            coverage/
            test-results/
            junit.xml
            coverage.xml
          retention-days: 7

  summary:
    needs: [validate-inputs, build, test]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Generate summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Environment**: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Command**: \`${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Test Command**: \`${{ github.event.inputs.test_command }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Validation**: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build**: ${{ needs.build.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Test**: ${{ needs.test.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
